howItWorks.intro: This sanctions effectiveness score by country uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Effectiveness score based on GDP impact, trade disruption, behavior change, and evasion levels
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: Do sanctions work?
faq.answer: Research shows sanctions achieve their stated policy goals only about 30-40% of the time. They're most effective when targeting specific industries, backed by multilateral coalitions, and combined with diplomatic engagement. Unilateral sanctions are least effective.
